content:
📜 Secret Information Mechanics
✔ Some players will have knowledge that others do not.
✔ Players may reveal or withhold their secret options.
✔ All choices must be locked in before revealing the full picture.

✅ Why This Works:
• Creates a sense of social tension and strategic depth.
• Encourages players to share or withhold knowledge for their own benefit.
• Mirrors how interpretation and knowledge work in literature—some meanings are hidden until revealed.

📜 4. The Resurrection System – Exile, Not Death

📜 Instead of “dying,” failed players are sent to literary exile and must earn their way back.

✔ Players who fail too many challenges, betray too often, or lose all XP are “banished.”
context: From document: RPG Character System (Fully Integrated into Weekly Modules) — chunk 295 (chunk 295/555)
